sentences.arabic: أَظُنُّ أَنَّ تَعَلُّمَ لُغَةٍ جَدِيدَةٍ يَفْتَحُ آفَاقًا جَدِيدَةً.
sentences.translation: Mislim da učenje novog jezika otvara nove horizonte.
sentences.translationEn: I think that learning a new language opens new horizons.

sentences.arabic: حِينَ أَتَعَلَّمُ لُغَةً أَسْتَطِيعُ أَنْ أَتَحَدَّثَ مَعَ أُنَاسٍ جُدُدٍ.
sentences.translation: Kada učim jezik, mogu razgovarati s novim ljudima.
sentences.translationEn: When I learn a language I can talk with new people.

sentences.translation: Svaki jezik nas uči novoj kulturi.
sentences.translationEn: Every language teaches us a new culture.

sentences.arabic: أُحِبُّ تَعَلُّمَ اللُّغَاتِ لِأَنَّهَا مُمْتِعَةٌ وَمُفِيدَةٌ.
sentences.translation: Volim učiti jezike jer su zabavni i korisni.
sentences.translationEn: I like learning languages because they are enjoyable and useful.
